This team made it through arc I of the main story smoothly but is struggling in dtide alerts 4 and 5, what can I do to improve it?
raise the soulforge

ok quick answer: because it's the ruleset
arc1 is Faded Legacy ruleset while dtide is arrc2 ruleset which enable the soulforge 'adjust'
Soul forge was already 10 on everyone except og Murphy, it’s 10 on them all now
and GMurphy, Tulu, Miryam, Faros and Goliath have a special synegy with each other in the same faction called Lemurian
hence you can swap out Murphy vanilla for Goliath for STR buff

Uh it’s fine
But doesn't horla retaining her cards fuck up ghelot's flow ?
depend on which cards

her basic strike/defend at your e applies debuff (ans she's a debuff monster)
we don't count the 2 cost
the 0 cost is free
so at worst it only may clog up a bit, and assuming you have someone with handsize wheel
*note: u still need to play her cards semi-often to redux the clogging btw*

your gameplan is have jenkins x card and sayas 0 cost in hand, play jenkins x card, use saya discard, draw into the multi hit you just created, annihilate > play insight for 1 arith and trigger all the corrosion
I feel like she makes hand management so much easier.
That's the thing though if you do x into Saya discard, you have no arithmetica left to actually play it.
So that's where I get tripped up.
do you know what annihilation is

the ultra mechanic
No? Do you mean the extra turn?
if you click on the purple swirly circle next to your ultra bar
you can delete the left most card
for one insight
